## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Scope

- affected docs
- affected code paths
- non-goals

## Validation

- [ ] docs reviewed for consistency
- [ ] API changes reflected in `API_SPEC.md`
- [ ] data model changes reflected in `DATA_MODEL.md`
- [ ] sync behavior changes reflected in `SYNC_FLOW.md`
- [ ] implementation plan updated if delivery scope changed

## Risks

- backward compatibility impact
- migration or rollout concerns
- unresolved follow-ups
